title: API Gateway Timeout Cascade Affecting All External Endpoints
symptoms: 504 Gateway Timeout errors on all external API routes
Kong worker processes at 100% utilization with zero free workers
API response times exceeding 30-second timeout threshold
Rate-limiting plugin logs showing synchronous DB connection timeouts
Upstream services healthy but unreachable through the gateway
root_cause: Misconfigured rate-limiting plugin performing synchronous database lookups instead of local in-memory counter, exhausting gateway worker pool
resolution: Rolled back the rate-limiting plugin configuration to the previous working version, restarted Kong worker processes, and verified all API endpoints operational
preventive_actions: Implement canary deployment for API gateway configuration changes
Add gateway worker pool utilization alerting
Create staging environment mirroring production gateway topology
Mandate load testing for all plugin configuration changes
Implement circuit breaker on rate-limiting plugin database connection

timeline.event: First 504 timeout errors detected on external API endpoints
Automated alert fires for API error rate exceeding threshold
Jenny Liu begins investigation, confirms all upstreams healthy
Worker pool exhaustion identified, rate-limiting plugin suspected
Root cause confirmed as misconfigured rate-limiting plugin
Configuration rollback initiated to previous working version
Kong workers restarted, API endpoints begin recovering
All API endpoints verified operational, incident resolved

embedding_summary: Kong API Gateway timeout cascade in EU-West-1 caused by misconfigured rate-limiting plugin performing synchronous database lookups. All external API endpoints returned 504 errors for 28 minutes, affecting 45 enterprise partners and 2.3M API calls. Resolved by rolling back plugin configuration.
